appTalkScribe.app/Contents/MacOS/appTalkScribe -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtQuickControls2.framework/Versions/A/QtQuickControls2 /opt/homebrew/lib/QtConcurrent.framework/Versions/A/QtConcurrent -framework CoreAudio -framework AudioToolbox -framework AudioUnit -framework ApplicationServices _deps/whisper-build/src/libwhisper.a
